title: Molten Navel Croatian Dish Grill
description: A briny, molten, cozy Croatian dish featuring bay leaves, perfect for a cold evening on the robata grill. This anti-inflammatory friendly dish is sure to become a favorite.
instructions: Prepare the octopus by cutting it into 2cm pieces and seasoning with salt, pepper, and red pepper flakes.
In a large bowl, whisk together olive oil, garlic, and bay leaves.
Add the octopus to the bowl and toss to coat with the marinade.
Let the octopus marinate for at least 30 minutes, or up to 2 hours in the refrigerator.
Thread the marinated octopus onto skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
Grill the octopus over medium-high heat for 4-5 minutes per side, or until slightly charred and cooked through.
Transfer the grilled octopus to a plate and brush with white wine.
Top with anchovies, lemon slices, and chopped parsley.
Serve immediately, garnished with additional bay leaves if desired.
